statement: In every magma, Equation 77 (`x = y * (y * (y * z))`) implies Equation 4238 (`x * y = ((z * z) * w) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0573
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op y (op y z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z z) w) y)
